SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-16-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:25am
Judge Pro Tem Joseph Jedeikin, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record, dept. 525:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeals. Appellant, David Vaknin, appears through counsel, Nathan Kabanuck; Respondent, Jan A. Kopezynski, appears in Pro Per. Mr. Kepeznski, appears with a witness, Jennifer Keopezynski. Parties and witness, previously sworn, testify in the narrartive and respond to questions from Judge Jedekin. Witness Jennifer Parker, appears as a witness for the Appellant.
